voxatlas.features.acoustic.envelope.onset#

Classes

HilbertOnset()

Extract a binary onset contour from an upstream envelope representation.

LogEnergyOnset()

Extract a binary onset contour from an upstream envelope representation.

OganianOnset()

Extract a binary onset contour from an upstream envelope representation.

PraatIntensityOnset()

Extract a binary onset contour from an upstream envelope representation.

RmsOnset()

Extract a binary onset contour from an upstream envelope representation.

VarnetOnset()

Extract a binary onset contour from an upstream envelope representation.
